skills.title: Skills — Matt
skills.description: Community management skills: Discord setup, Twitch moderation, regex, team building.

hero.headline:
Skills &
Capabilities
hero.lead: A toolkit refined across 9+ years of real-world community management on multiple platforms.

skills.contentHtml:
🏗️

Discord Server Setup

Clean, professional servers from scratch — channels, roles, bots, formatting, the whole thing done right.

📺

Twitch Moderation

Real-time chat moderation at scale — keeping the vibe right, handling bans, managing high-volume streams.

</>

Regex Automation

Building regex patterns for automated moderation — filtering messages, detecting patterns, keeping things hands-off.

🛡️

Building Mod Teams

Recruiting the right people, setting expectations, and keeping a team working together effectively.

📋

Community Guidelines

Writing clear, enforceable rules — concise enough people actually read them, detailed enough they hold up.

🤝

Conflict Resolution

De-escalating situations, handling appeals fairly, making tough calls while keeping trust on both sides.

Interested?

Let's work together

Looking for a Community Manager or Head Mod? I'm available.

Get in TouchSee My Experience

recommendations.title: Recommendations — Matt
recommendations.description: Tools Matt recommends for Discord and Twitch moderation: Bleed Bot and Fossabot.

hero.headline:
Stuff I
Recommend
hero.lead: Tools I've personally used and vouch for when running and moderating online communities. No fluff—just the best utilities I actually recommend.

recommendations.contentHtml:
🩸

Bleed Bot

Tool

A solid Discord bot for keeping your server in check. Great for moderation, management, and keeping things running smoothly.

Check it out →
🐸

Fossabot

ToolMade by Twitch Staff

Fossabot is amazing — built by people who actually work at Twitch, so they know exactly what streamers need. Trusted by the biggest names on the platform. Visit fossabot.com for details.

01 · Standard Commands

Commands like !followage and !uptime built right in.

02 · Auto-Mod Actions

Auto-ban on blocked words — beyond what Twitch's native tools can do.

03 · Spam Filter

Blocks non-English spam and filler messages hands-free.

04 · Used by the Biggest

xQc, Kai, Poki and more. If it's good enough for them, it's good enough for you.

Visit fossabot.com💬 Support Server🐦 Twitter
